docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURNED MAIL RECEIVED AFTER ENTRY OF JUDGMENT - SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 11/30/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KLASSY, THOMAS ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT SCOTT, PATRESE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-21-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-21-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF THOMAS KLASSY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PATRESE SCOTT IS PRESENT FOR GEO GROUP CASE MANAGER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED IN CASE 18-858994. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO PLAINTIFF RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNABLE TO FORWARD
ORDER CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-02-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTT, PATRESE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY KLASSY, THOMAS AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTT, PATRESE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-30-2018 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO DEC-21-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 TO BE HEARD WITH CASES CSM 18-859063, AND CSM 18-859064. PLAINTIFF THOMAS KLASSY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARIA RICHARD DIRECTOR OF GEO GROUP IS PRESENT DEFENDANT CHIRSTINE LOO IS PRESENT, DEFENDANT PATRESE SCOTT IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KLASSY, THOMAS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SCOTT, PATRESE PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO CARRY HIS BURDEN OF PROVING THAT DEFENDANT SCOTT WRONGFULLY CONFISCATED AND RETAINED HIS PERSONAL PROPERTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-21-2018 - JUDGMENT.
